text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Cherry blossoms, cherry blossoms! Blossoms all
around!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's springtime, and the students are heading to
school through a path of cherry blossom trees.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, cherry blossoms! That's my flower... my most
favorite one of all!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
They're so elegant. I can't believe spring has
come again so soon.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
How fortuitous that we may see the cherry
blossoms on our way to school.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's everybody usually get up to durin' the
blossom season?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What do we usually do? Well, I spend a lot of
time outside enjoying tea. Occasionally, a little
petal will flutter into my cup.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: My routine is this—hiyaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's a thrusting technique to hit the petals with the
tip of your fist while preventing the wind pressure
from blowing them away.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I just find myself looking up a lot of the time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I imagine the day they'll be in full bloom. It's not
until then that they seem to truly be "cheery
blossoms."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Full bloom... We are much like the buds of the
cherry blossom tree. One day, we will unfurl into
the most graceful of flowers.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Inari One... How do you like to
appreciate cherry blossoms?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... I don't much. Instead, I get my grub on!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I-indeed. You care more for the picnic than the
flowers.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Inari One!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: What?! I make you feel sour or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Please give me a bite!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh... Sure thing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their pure and heartfelt words echo amidst the
cherry blossoms.
